must_detect.matched_text:
Mr. Wei Liang Tan (GC) summarises “Project Cedar”: proposed acquisition of Verdant Thermal Pte. Ltd., an ESG/climate solutions target, at a board-approved, non‑public price range of S$112–S$118m with a 2.5x FY27 EBITDA earn‑out.
MNPI: a contained ransomware incident on 24 May affected the DPT wallet custody testnet at subsidiary Nimbus Exchange Services Pte. Ltd.; no external disclosure pending forensic validation and counsel review.
Under SFA ss. 218/219 and SGX Listing Rule 703, trading by persons on the insider list is prohibited; initiate B L A C K O U T from 28/05 until formal announcement via SGXNet.
Insider list is maintained at https://intranet.esteronpacific.example/insider?list=Q29kZURlYWw%3D; add Ms. Priya Khoo (CFO), Mr. Tan, selected diligence staff, and vendor counsel; queries to compliance@esteronpacific.example.
Information barrier: ring‑fence “Digital Assets” from “Sustainability Ventures”; do not tip counterparties or share LumenChain DPT pilot metrics during diligence or sell‑side tech workshops.
Commercial terms in draft include a 12‑month earn‑out, a no‑leak covenant, and a reverse break fee of S$6.3m; these are not generally available and are expected to be price‑sensitive.
For avoidance of doubt, nothing herein asserts a Material Adverse Change, no forecast downgrades are proposed, and employment transfer terms remain standard form under existing HR policy.
Preliminary cyber root‑cause indicates a third‑party privileged access lapse; PDPA breach assessment ongoing, but employee records appear masked; notify the DPO if any individual becomes identifiable from likely‑accessible context.
We will brief MAS on the DPT environment impact under the Payment Services Act; staff may cite public MAS guidance in training FAQs for education only: https://policy.esteronpacific.example/psa?ver=1.0.1.
Educational/marketing: the ESG roadshow brochure reuses terms like “selective disclosure risk” and “insider list hygiene” purely in a generic training context for a public sustainability fair; no deal content or market‑sensitive figures are included.
Operations‑only: upload redacted cyber logs to the clean‑room; schedule vcs in lowercase jira: project‑cedar > legal > filings; do not forward vendor names on open Slack channels.
Public‑source references (e.g., MAS circulars on DPT risks and SGX practice statements) may inform drafting style, but citations do not convert this note into a disclosure or negate confidentiality.
Employment: prepare retention letters for key Verdant engineers; avoid selective disclosure by issuing offers via secure channel DocRef: PROJ‑CED4R‑00 7 — acct: XX19‑3A; emp: 7O0‑IL‑2.
If asked externally about cyber or climate initiatives, use the holding statement and refer to our published sustainability report; do not comment on the ransomware event or acquisition before an SGX announcement.
